ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-16-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CSTV ONLINE, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT WAS DILIGENT IN FILING THE MOTION FOR RELIEF, THE MOTION WAS ACCOMPANIED BY AN ATTORNEY DECLARATION ATTESTING THAT ATTORNEY MISTAKE AND NEGLECT CAUSED ENTRY OF DEFAULT, AND THERE IS NO BASIS FOR THE COURT TO FIND OTHERWISE. THUS, RELIEF IS REQUIRED AND THE MOTION SHOULD BE GRANTED. (CCP 473(B).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/MJM)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SARA AHMED OF BRYAN CAVE LLP, TEL. NO. 675-3475 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CSTV ONLINE, INC.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is granted. Defendant was diligent in filing the Motion for relief, the Motion was accompanied by an attorney declaration attesting that attorney mistake and neglect caused entry of default, and there is no basis for the Court to find otherwise. Thus, relief is required and the Motion should be granted. (CCP 473(b).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
